final:
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    output reg out_mux
);always @(*) begin
    if(sel_b1) begin
        out_mux = b;
    end else begin
        out_mux = a;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out_mux <= ~a; out_mux <= ~b;
    end
  end

endmodule
